default.name: Default Vietnamese Voice (Edge-TTS fallback)
default.description: Uses Edge-TTS fallback when no reference audio provided

_README.description: To use Qwen-TTS voice cloning, add speaker configs like this:

my_voice.name: My Custom Voice
my_voice.text: Xin chào, đây là giọng nói của tôi.
my_voice.description: My cloned voice from reference audio

notes: audio_path: Path to 5-15 second WAV file of target voice
text: Transcript of what is said in the reference audio
Both audio_path and text are required for voice cloning
Without these, system falls back to Edge-TTS
